response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical versatility across languages (including C, C++, D, JavaScript/TypeScript), and a proven track record in building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of leading experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or AI-driven growth frameworks at enterprise scale — key requirements for the role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience with distributed systems and high-throughput services (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Proven ability to build and ship cross-team infrastructure (GISCollective, CI/CD setups, test frameworks)
Strong data and telemetry exposure through real-time analytics, geo-data platforms, and performance-critical applications
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning experimentation frameworks, guardrails, or rollout automation systems
Limited demonstration of AI tooling used to accelerate engineering velocity or enable growth experiments
Experience with feature flagging and measurement platforms is implied but not explicitly documented or quantified
